title: Downside: Ice Edition
description: Immerse yourself in an icy world filled with dangers, adventures and dungeons.
body:
![Downside Ice Edition] (https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89c7297e5c8e8e2e0c3f1b9469bd14ec5a150d25_0.webp)

The cool winter Post-Apocalyptic modpack

About Modpack

**Eternal winter reigns in the world, the world is limited to 5,000 x 5,000 blocks, you can find a large number of high towers, a large number of different dungeons.** ### Join [Discord](https://discord.gg/QfxWEKX3T7) and send you idea for modpack.

How to survive

Little Guide 1. Try to get things on the surface and then go to the caves where you will have to make a base. The best option is to live next to the bunker. He will provide you not only with resources, but also with experience and food. 2. First of all, after building a base and extracting a small amount of resources, you need to build a portal in nether. There you will find special blue fruits needed to make a cold protection potion. After receiving nether wart and soul sprout, you need to create basin and mixer. 3. By making a cold protection potion, you can explore the world in peace. The next stage of development will be becoming a hunter or a vampire or a werewolf. Transformation will make your life easier and easier. 4. A good option is to search for dungeons, and especially from the Iron Spell and SpellBooks mods, in which you can often find caches of resources.

Modpack Content

**Magic** **mods:** - Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks - Cataclysm: Spellbooks - Glimmering Tales - MC Calamity - SnackPirate's Aeromancy Additions - Mutated Items - Portable Hole - Relics - Relics: Artifacts Compat - Artifats - Luminous - Luminous: Beasts - Luminous: Butterflies - Luminous: Monsters **Technological** **mods:** - Create - Create: Bells & Whistles - Create: Let The Adventure Begin - Storage Drawers **Vanila** **plus** **mods:** - Advancement Plaques - Ars Elixirum - Anvil Never Too Expensive - AmbientSounds - AppleSkin - Antique Atlas 4 - Basic Weapons - Better Advancements - BetterF3 - Bottled Air - Bridging Mod - Butchery - Clean Tooltips - Combat Roll - Continuity - Chat Heads - Durability Tooltip - Dynamic Crosshair - Double Doors - Easy Magic - Effect Descriptions - Enchanting Infuser - Expanded Combat - FallingTree - Fishermen's Trap - Falling Leaves (NeoForge/Forge) - Golden Foods! - Grindstone Sharper Tools - GraveStone Mod - Held Item Tooltips - Immersive Snow - Item Borders - Item Highlighter - ItemPhysic - Just Enough Items - Lootr - Merchant Markers - Metal Bundles - MmmMmmMmmMmm - Model Gap Fix - Mouse Tweaks - Nature's Compass - No Hostiles Around Campfire - Not Enough Animations - Overflowing Bars - Pick Up Notifier - Polymorph - Project: Vibrant Journeys - Torch hit! - Traveler's Titles - Sophisticated Backpacks - Villager Names - Visual Workbench - Visuality: Reforged - Void Totem - World Border - Zume **Hell** **mods:** - Cold Sweat - Ender Dragon Fight Remastered - End Remastered - Desert Scourge - Improved Mobs - Illager Invasion - L_Ender's Cataclysm - Primal Winter - Serene Seasons - Better Days - Enhanced Celestials **Structure** **mods:** - Additional Structures - Amendments - Battle Towers - Dungeons and Taverns - Philips Ruins - Underground Bunkers - YUNG's Better Desert Temples - YUNG's Better Dungeons - YUNG's Better End Island - YUNG's Better Jungle Temples - YUNG's Better Mineshafts - YUNG's Better Nether Fortresses - YUNG's Better Ocean Monuments - YUNG's Better Strongholds - YUNG's Better Witch Huts **Cool** **mods:** - Cardiac - Chalk - Drink Beer Refill - Musket Mod - Mutated Items - Vampirism - Werewolves **Bosses** **mods:** - Desert Scourge - L_Ender's Cataclysm - Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks
